agent: N-17 prep (Intel Loihi 3 INRC application spec)
mission: Author Loihi 3 INRC application spec ($0 budget, no submission, no account, no Intel contact). Loihi 3 = second neuromorphic axis after AKIDA AKD1000 (N-3).
application_flow_5step: 1. Email inrc_interest@intel.com from institutional address; request RFP + project proposal template (1-5 business days response)
2. Draft project proposal per template (1-3 weeks)
3. Submit proposal to inrc_interest@intel.com; INRC technical review (2-6 weeks)
4. Upon acceptance: institution executes INRC Participation Agreement (1-4 weeks legal)
5. NRC vLab account provisioning + SSH keys + Lava SDK access (1-2 weeks)

eligibility.verbatim_intel_text_paraphrase: Membership is free and open to all qualified groups. Permanent employee of an established research organization (university, corporate, government lab). Must submit project proposal.
hard_requirements: Permanent employee at established research org
Authorized legal signatory at institution (NOT the PI) for Participation Agreement
Project proposal aligned with INRC themes

korean_researcher_access.kr_precedent_published: NOT_VERIFIED (no public roll of KR INRC members found 2026-05-01)
korean_researcher_access.us_export_control_BIS: STANDARD (KR ally clears EAR; chip-level data may trigger ECCN review handled by Intel)
korean_researcher_access.loaner_hardware_to_korea: CASE_BY_CASE (4-8wk extra paperwork; cloud-only NRC avoids this)

anima_specific_gap: No legal entity to sign Participation Agreement
Independent research = qualified group criterion ambiguous
mitigation_paths_priority: 1. Sponsor route (KR university co-PI: KAIST CCN / SNU EE / POSTECH AI) - LOWEST FRICTION
2. Industrial route (Samsung SAIT / LG AI) - HIGH FRICTION (IP entanglement)
3. Personal-academic route (visiting scholar at US/EU INRC member institution) - SLOWEST

loihi3_architecture.multi_chip_systems: Hala Point successor TBD (Loihi 2 Hala Point: 1.15B neurons / 128B synapses)

loihi3_only: 32-bit graded spike representation precision (vs binary in Akida 1.0)
Native Lava Process graph Python authoring (vs CNN2SNN translation)
Multi-chip Hala-Point-class scaling >1B neurons (vs single-chip dev kit)
akd1000_retains: Open retail, no NDA / IP entanglement
loihi3_vs_akd1000_unique_capabilities.n17_role: SECOND neuromorphic axis (parallel to N-3, not replacement)

phi_measurement_protocol_8step: 2. Define Lava Process graph (input encoder -> graded-spike LIF layers -> output spike monitor)
3. NRC compile + deploy to Loihi 3 chip slot
4. Inference: 16 prompts x T_inf x N_reps=40
5. Spike rate-avg projection (re-use N-3 lemma): X_loihi[i,d] = (1/T) * sum_t S[t,d]
6. Phi* compute on X_loihi (re-use anima_phi_v3, READ-ONLY)
7. Dual cross-substrate corr: Pearson r vs CLM-GPU AND vs AKIDA
paradigm_v11_axis_mapping: Same G1, G4, G7, G8; differs at G2 (Lava native SNN), G3 (graded-spike value vector), G5 (Loihi 3 inference rate TBD), G6 (DUAL gate vs both GPU and AKIDA)
n2_pipeline_reuse: ADM encoder + raster + uint8-tensor stage E from N-2 transfers directly; share tool/anima_signal_to_neuromorphic_spike.hexa in M2

deliverables_6mo.M1: NRC vLab onboarding + Lava SDK + 'hello SNN' smoke
deliverables_6mo.M2: 16-prompt fixture ported to Lava Process graph + spike-rate avg helper
deliverables_6mo.M4: M-L1 + M-L2 complete (Loihi 3 vs AKIDA r reported, 3-seed)
deliverables_6mo.M5: M-L3 (Loihi vs CLM) + M-L4 (graded vs binary spike ablation)
deliverables_6mo.M6: M-L5 (on-chip learning ablation) + final report draft + arXiv preprint

falsifier_predicates_5.F-N17-A1: Loihi3 Phi vs AKIDA Phi Pearson r >= 0.85 (cross-neuromorphic)
falsifier_predicates_5.F-N17-A2: Loihi3 Phi vs CLM-GPU Phi Pearson r >= 0.85 AND magnitude divergence <= 0.30
falsifier_predicates_5.F-N17-A3: Graded-spike vs binary-spike ablation (Phi bit-precision invariance test)
falsifier_predicates_5.F-N17-A4: On-chip learning ablation (Phi plasticity coupling test)
falsifier_predicates_5.F-N17-A5: Null-floor (1024-perm) + 3-seed reproducibility + K=8 partition variance + surrogate fidelity sanity

verdict_graduation_matrix.F1_FAIL_F2_FAIL: LOIHI_OUTLIER (replication needed; possible Lava bug or calibration)

cp2_f1_integration.f1_graduation_rule: substrate WITNESSED count >= 3/4 primary with cross-substrate r >= 0.85 -> own#2 (b) CLOSED with Putnam multi-realizability
cp2_f1_integration.n17_n3_relationship: INDEPENDENT but COMPLEMENTARY; N-3 first (AKIDA arrival), N-17 follows (INRC approval); N-3 result informs N-17 proposal sec 3
